prompt: Dark cinematic reveal, glowing indigo light sweeps across abstract financial data particles, bold Chinese title fades in with dramatic depth-of-field, premium dark UI materializes from void.
Sleek smartphone held in soft studio light, finger taps price field on dark trading interface, input glows indigo as realistic asset value '42850' types in smoothly, camera dollies closer.
Smartphone screen fills frame, probability-weighted expected value result pulses with indigo accent glow, camera slowly pulls back revealing polished device floating in dramatic dark gradient light.
